reason: Changing the system-wide cryptographic policy to FIPS:STIG can alter all cryptographic operations, including SSH, TLS, and other services. This may lead to loss of SSH access or break critical services if the new policy is incompatible with existing configurations. The change is a FIPS mode adjustment, which the policy explicitly marks as too dangerous to remediate without careful review.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; networking affected; Potential loss of SSH access; Impact on system-wide cryptographic operations; FIPS mode changes
